2423
2424 Metadata *Op = Node->getOperand(0);
2425 if (!Op || !isa<MDString>(Op))
2426 return;
2427
2428 DIDescriptor Desc(Node);
2429 if (!Desc.Verify())
2430 return;
2431
2432 unsigned Tag = Desc.getTag();
2433 Out.PadToColumn(50);
2434 if (dwarf::TagString(Tag)) {
2435 Out << "; ";
2436 Desc.print(Out);
2437 } else if (Tag == dwarf::DW_TAG_user_base) {
2438 Out << "; [ DW_TAG_user_base ]";
2439 }
2440}
2441
2442void AssemblyWriter::writeMDNode(unsigned Slot, const MDNode *Node) {
2443 Out << '!' << Slot << " = ";
2444 printMDNodeBody(Node);
2445}
2446
2447void AssemblyWriter::writeAllMDNodes() {
2448 SmallVector<const MDNode *, 16> Nodes;
2449 Nodes.resize(Machine.mdn_size());
2450 for (SlotTracker::mdn_iterator I = Machine.mdn_begin(), E = Machine.mdn_end();
2451 I != E; ++I)
2452 Nodes[I->second] = cast<MDNode>(I->first);
2453
2454 for (unsigned i = 0, e = Nodes.size(); i != e; ++i) {
2455 writeMDNode(i, Nodes[i]);
2456 }
2457}
2458
2459void AssemblyWriter::printMDNodeBody(const MDNode *Node) {
2460 WriteMDNodeBodyInternal(Out, Node, &TypePrinter, &Machine, TheModule);
2461 WriteMDNodeComment(Node, Out);
2462 Out << "\n";
2463}
2464
2465void AssemblyWriter::writeAllAttributeGroups() {
2466 std::vector<std::pair<AttributeSet, unsigned> > asVec;
2467 asVec.resize(Machine.as_size());
2468
2469 for (SlotTracker::as_iterator I = Machine.as_begin(), E = Machine.as_end();
2470 I != E; ++I)
2471 asVec[I->second] = *I;
2472
2473 for (std::vector<std::pair<AttributeSet, unsigned> >::iterator
2474 I = asVec.begin(), E = asVec.end(); I != E; ++I)
2475 Out << "attributes #" << I->second << " = { "
2476 << I->first.getAsString(AttributeSet::FunctionIndex, true) << " }\n";
2477}
2478
2479} // namespace llvm
2480
2481void AssemblyWriter::printUseListOrder(const UseListOrder &Order) {
2482 bool IsInFunction = Machine.getFunction();
2483 if (IsInFunction)
2484 Out << " ";
2485
2486 Out << "uselistorder";
2487 if (const BasicBlock *BB =
2488 IsInFunction ? nullptr : dyn_cast<BasicBlock>(Order.V)) {
2489 Out << "_bb ";
2490 writeOperand(BB->getParent(), false);
2491 Out << ", ";
2492 writeOperand(BB, false);
2493 } else {
2494 Out << " ";
2495 writeOperand(Order.V, true);
2496 }
2497 Out << ", { ";
2498
2499 assert(Order.Shuffle.size() >= 2 && "Shuffle too small");
2500 Out << Order.Shuffle[0];
2501 for (unsigned I = 1, E = Order.Shuffle.size(); I != E; ++I)
2502 Out << ", " << Order.Shuffle[I];
2503 Out << " }\n";
2504}
2505
2506void AssemblyWriter::printUseLists(const Function *F) {
2507 auto hasMore =
2508 [&]() { return !UseListOrders.empty() && UseListOrders.back().F == F; };
2509 if (!hasMore())
2510 // Nothing to do.
2511 return;
2512
2513 Out << "\n; uselistorder directives\n";
2514 while (hasMore()) {
2515 printUseListOrder(UseListOrders.back());
2516 UseListOrders.pop_back();
2517 }
2518}
2519
2520//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
2521// External Interface declarations
2522//===----------------------------------------------------------------------===//
2523
2524void Module::print(raw_ostream &ROS, AssemblyAnnotationWriter *AAW) const {
2525 SlotTracker SlotTable(this);
2526 formatted_raw_ostream OS(ROS);
2527 AssemblyWriter W(OS, SlotTable, this, AAW);
2528 W.printModule(this);
2529}
2530
2531void NamedMDNode::print(raw_ostream &ROS) const {
2532 SlotTracker SlotTable(getParent());
2533 formatted_raw_ostream OS(ROS);
2534 AssemblyWriter W(OS, SlotTable, getParent(), nullptr);
2535 W.printNamedMDNode(this);
2536}
2537
2538void Comdat::print(raw_ostream &ROS) const {
2539 PrintLLVMName(ROS, getName(), ComdatPrefix);
2540 ROS << " = comdat ";
2541
2542 switch (getSelectionKind()) {
2543 case Comdat::Any:
2544 ROS << "any";
2545 break;
2546 case Comdat::ExactMatch:
2547 ROS << "exactmatch";
2548 break;
2549 case Comdat::Largest:
2550 ROS << "largest";
2551 break;
2552 case Comdat::NoDuplicates:
2553 ROS << "noduplicates";
2554 break;
2555 case Comdat::SameSize:
2556 ROS << "samesize";
2557 break;
2558 }
2559
2560 ROS << '\n';
2561}
2562
2563void Type::print(raw_ostream &OS) const {
2564 TypePrinting TP;
2565 TP.print(const_cast<Type*>(this), OS);
2566
2567 // If the type is a named struct type, print the body as well.
2568 if (StructType *STy = dyn_cast<StructType>(const_cast<Type*>(this)))
2569 if (!STy->isLiteral()) {
2570 OS << " = type ";
2571 TP.printStructBody(STy, OS);
2572 }
2573}
2574
2575void Value::print(raw_ostream &ROS) const {
2576 formatted_raw_ostream OS(ROS);
2577 if (const Instruction *I = dyn_cast<Instruction>(this)) {
2578 const Function *F = I->getParent() ? I->getParent()->getParent() : nullptr;
2579 SlotTracker SlotTable(F);
2580 AssemblyWriter W(OS, SlotTable, getModuleFromVal(I), nullptr);
2581 W.printInstruction(*I);
2582 } else if (const BasicBlock *BB = dyn_cast<BasicBlock>(this)) {
2583 SlotTracker SlotTable(BB->getParent());
2584 AssemblyWriter W(OS, SlotTable, getModuleFromVal(BB), nullptr);
2585 W.printBasicBlock(BB);
2586 } else if (const GlobalValue *GV = dyn_cast<GlobalValue>(this)) {
2587 SlotTracker SlotTable(GV->getParent());
2588 AssemblyWriter W(OS, SlotTable, GV->getParent(), nullptr);
2589 if (const GlobalVariable *V = dyn_cast<GlobalVariable>(GV))
2590 W.printGlobal(V);
2591 else if (const Function *F = dyn_cast<Function>(GV))
2592 W.printFunction(F);
2593 else
2594 W.printAlias(cast<GlobalAlias>(GV));
2595 } else if (const MetadataAsValue *V = dyn_cast<MetadataAsValue>(this)) {
2596 V->getMetadata()->print(ROS);
2597 } else if (const Constant *C = dyn_cast<Constant>(this)) {
2598 TypePrinting TypePrinter;
2599 TypePrinter.print(C->getType(), OS);
2600 OS << ' ';
2601 WriteConstantInternal(OS, C, TypePrinter, nullptr, nullptr);
2602 } else if (isa<InlineAsm>(this) || isa<Argument>(this)) {
2603 this->printAsOperand(OS);
2604 } else {
2605 llvm_unreachable("Unknown value to print out!");
2606 }
2607}
2608
2609void Value::printAsOperand(raw_ostream &O, bool PrintType, const Module *M) const {
2610 // Fast path: Don't construct and populate a TypePrinting object if we
2611 // won't be needing any types printed.
2612 if (!PrintType && ((!isa<Constant>(this) && !isa<MetadataAsValue>(this)) ||
2613 hasName() || isa<GlobalValue>(this))) {
2614 WriteAsOperandInternal(O, this, nullptr, nullptr, M);
2615 return;
2616 }
2617
2618 if (!M)
2619 M = getModuleFromVal(this);
2620
2621 TypePrinting TypePrinter;
2622 if (M)
2623 TypePrinter.incorporateTypes(*M);
2624 if (PrintType) {
2625 TypePrinter.print(getType(), O);
2626 O << ' ';
2627 }
2628
2629 WriteAsOperandInternal(O, this, &TypePrinter, nullptr, M);
2630}
2631
2632void Metadata::print(raw_ostream &ROS) const {
2633 formatted_raw_ostream OS(ROS);
2634 if (auto *N = dyn_cast<MDNode>(this)) {
2635 SlotTracker SlotTable(static_cast<Function *>(nullptr));
2636 AssemblyWriter W(OS, SlotTable, nullptr, nullptr);
2637 W.printMDNodeBody(N);
2638
2639 return;
2640 }
2641 printAsOperand(OS);
2642}
2643
2644void Metadata::printAsOperand(raw_ostream &ROS, bool PrintType,
2645 const Module *M) const {
2646 formatted_raw_ostream OS(ROS);
2647
2648 std::unique_ptr<TypePrinting> TypePrinter;
2649 if (PrintType) {
2650 TypePrinter.reset(new TypePrinting);
2651 if (M)
2652 TypePrinter->incorporateTypes(*M);
2653 }
2654 WriteAsOperandInternal(OS, this, TypePrinter.get(), nullptr, M,
2655 /* FromValue */ true);
2656}
2657
2658// Value::dump - allow easy printing of Values from the debugger.
2659void Value::dump() const { print(dbgs()); dbgs() << '\n'; }
2660
2661// Type::dump - allow easy printing of Types from the debugger.
2662void Type::dump() const { print(dbgs()); dbgs() << '\n'; }
2663
2664// Module::dump() - Allow printing of Modules from the debugger.
2665void Module::dump() const { print(dbgs(), nullptr); }
2666
2667// \brief Allow printing of Comdats from the debugger.
2668void Comdat::dump() const { print(dbgs()); }
2669
2670// NamedMDNode::dump() - Allow printing of NamedMDNodes from the debugger.
2671void NamedMDNode::dump() const { print(dbgs()); }
2672
2673void Metadata::dump() const {
2674 print(dbgs());
2675 dbgs() << '\n';
2676}
